rules.name: Basic
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 5) OR (4 AND 6)
rules.label: Basic

formulas.name: EndingAge
formula_34
formulas.expression:
if( ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Years_34__c}, "1"), 1,
0)

formulas.name: formula_3539
formula_4044
formula_4549
formula_5054
formula_5559
formula_6064
formula_6569
formula_7074
formula_7579
formula_80
formula_addlInsurance
formulas.expression: {!$Record.Pg10Rw20__c} + {!$Record.Pg10Rw20_Spouse__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw12__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw12_Spouse__c}

formulas.name: formula_annuityDefault
formula_checkboxes
formulas.expression: IF( ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Scenario1_Primary__c} ) && {!$Record.Scenario1_Primary__c} == true, {!$Record.Scenario2_Primary__c} == false, IF( ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Scenario2_Primary__c} ) && {!$Record.Scenario2_Primary__c} == true, {!$Record.Scenario1_Primary__c} == false, false ))

formulas.name: formula_Evaluation
formulas.expression: OR( ISCHANGED( {!$Record.taxRate1_Picklist__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.taxRate2_Picklist__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.taxRate3_Picklist__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.taxRate4_Picklist__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.taxRate5_Picklist__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.AnnualWithdraw1__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.AnnualWithdraw2__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw01_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw02_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw03_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw04_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw05_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw06_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw07_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw08_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw09_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw10_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw11_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw12_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw13_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw14_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw15_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw16_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw17_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw18_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw19_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw20_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw21_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw01__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw02__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw03__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw04__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw05__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw06__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw07__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw08__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw09__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw10__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw11__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw12__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw13__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw14__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw15__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw16__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw17__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw18__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw19__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw20__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg9Rw21__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw01_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw02_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw03_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw04_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw05_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw06_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw07_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw08_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw09_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw10_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw11_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw12_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw13_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw14_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw15_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw16_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw17_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw18_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw19_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw20_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw21_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw22_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw23_Spouse__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw01__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw02__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw03__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw04__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw05__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw06__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw07__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw08__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw09__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw10__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw11__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw12__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw13__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw14__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw15__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw16__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw17__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw18__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw19__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw20__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw21__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw22__c} ), ISCHANGED( {!$Record.Pg10Rw23__c} ))

formulas.name: formula_leadMobileformatted
formulas.expression: "(" & LEFT({!$Record.MobilePhone}, 3) & ") " & MID({!$Record.MobilePhone}, 4, 3) & "-" & RIGHT({!$Record.MobilePhone}, 4)

formulas.name: formula_leadPhoneformatted
formulas.expression: "(" & LEFT({!$Record.Phone}, 3) & ") " & MID({!$Record.Phone}, 4, 3) & "-" & RIGHT({!$Record.Phone}, 4)

formulas.name: formula_ManualAgeB
formula_OptionB
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Option_B_Choice_Selection__c} , '')), true, false )

formulas.name: formula_OptionC
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Option_C_Choice_Selection__c} , '')), true, false )

formulas.name: formula_pension
formula_survivingspouse
formula_totalDollars
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Option_B_Choice_Selection__c} , '' )) , (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 0.02) * 26) *VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_34__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 0.02) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_35_39__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 0.03) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_40_44__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 0.06) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_45_49__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 0.10) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_50_54__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 0.18) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_55_59__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 0.40) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_60_64__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 0.48) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_65_69__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 0.86) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_70_74__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 1.80) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_75_79__c} )) + (( {!$Record.OptionB_Insurance_Cover__c} * 2.88) * 26) * VALUE( TEXT( {!$Record.Years_80__c} )), 0 )

formulas.name: formula_totalHealth
formulas.expression: {!$Record.Pg9Rw13__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw14__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw15__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw16__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw17__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw13_Spouse__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw14_Spouse__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw15_Spouse__c}+ {!$Record.Pg9Rw16_Spouse__c} + {!$Record.Pg9Rw17_Spouse__c}

formulas.name: formula_tspBalance
formula_YOS1
formula_YOS2

recordUpdates.name: Update_Lead_Again_with_Option_B
recordUpdates.label: Update Lead Again with Option B
